name: Getty Realty Corp.
description: Getty Realty Corp is a net lease real estate investment trust in the U.S.A, specializing in the acquisition, financing, and development of convenience, automotive, and other single-tenant retail real estate. The company's portfolio includes convenience stores, express tunnel car washes, automotive service centers (gasoline and repair, oil and maintenance, tire and battery, and collision), drive-thru quick service restaurants, and certain other freestanding retail properties. It generates maximum revenue in the form of rental income.
